name: Fried Oysters Wrapped in Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1 Dozen fresh, shucked oysters (in a small bowl)
recipeInstructions:
1 In a 1 quart saucepan, on a medium flame, poach oysters in oyster liquor with bay leaf and Worcestershire sauce (about 2 minutes, until the edges of the oysters curl). Remove oysters from liquor and set aside. Discard liquor.
2 Cut bacon strips in thirds. Wrap each oyster with bacon and fasten with a toothpick.
3 Roll each wrapped oyster in flour, dip in eggs, and then roll in bread crumbs.
4 Heat oil in a 9 inch skillet. When oil begins to smoke, reduce heat.
5 Fry the oysters for 5 minutes, turning off the heat when done.
6 Drain on paper towels and serve immediately. Yields 12 oysters.
